dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: The city of Seoul. A sprawling concrete jungle, indifferent to the dreams and anxieties of the millions who flock to its heart.

dialogue.speaker: YOON JONG-WOO
dialogue.line: (Thought) Finally. Seoul. No more small town, no more dead-end future. This is it. My fresh start.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: TRAFFIC ROAR. SIRENS WAIL. CITY HUM.

dialogue.speaker: YOON JONG-WOO
dialogue.line: (Thought) The internship at the IT company... it's not much, but it's a foot in the door. I just need a place to live, something cheap.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Days blurred into a frustrating search. Every apartment too expensive, every gosiwon too squalid. Until he found it. Eden Studio.

dialogue.speaker: YOON JONG-WOO
dialogue.line: (Thought) 'Eden Studio.' The name sounds... nice, at least. And the rent... it's almost too good to be true.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: CREAK. SQUEAK.

dialogue.speaker: LANDLADY
dialogue.line: Oh, hello there, young man! You must be Mr. Yoon Jong-woo. Welcome, welcome! Come right in!

dialogue.speaker: YOON JONG-WOO
dialogue.line: Ah, yes. I'm Yoon Jong-woo. I called about the room.

dialogue.speaker: LANDLADY
dialogue.line: Of course! Such a polite young man. Room 303 is perfect for you. It just opened up. Lucky you!

dialogue.speaker: YOON JONG-WOO
dialogue.line: (Thought) Her smile... it's a bit too wide. And her eyes... they're not smiling at all.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: FOOTSTEPS ECHO. FAINT WHIRRING SOUND.

dialogue.speaker: LANDLADY
dialogue.line: Here we are! Cozy, isn't it? Everything you need right here. Bed, desk, even a mini-fridge!

dialogue.speaker: YOON JONG-WOO
dialogue.line: (Thought) 'Cozy' is one word for it. 'Cramped' is another. This is barely bigger than my old closet. And the smell...

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: DUSTY SMELL. CLOSETED AIR.

dialogue.speaker: YOON JONG-WOO
dialogue.line: It's... fine. The bathroom is shared, right?

dialogue.speaker: LANDLADY
dialogue.line: Oh, yes! Very convenient. And the kitchen too! Everyone here is like family. We all look out for each other.

dialogue.speaker: YOON JONG-WOO
dialogue.line: (Thought) 'Family.' The way she said it... it didn't sound comforting. It sounded... possessive.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: DOOR CREAKS SHUT. LOCK CLICKS.

dialogue.speaker: YOON JONG-WOO
dialogue.line: (Thought) Okay, Jong-woo. It's temporary. Just until you get on your feet. You can handle this. It's just a gosiwon.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: DISTANT COUGH. MUTTERING FROM NEXT ROOM. DRIPPING WATER.

dialogue.speaker: YOON JONG-WOO
dialogue.line: (Thought) What was that? Sounded like someone... talking to themselves? Or to something else?

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: SCRAPE. SCRATCH. A LOW CHUCKLE.

dialogue.speaker: YOON JONG-WOO
dialogue.line: (Thought) This place... it's not just cheap. It's unsettling. I hope I didn't make a mistake.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: FAN WHIRS LOUDLY. JONG-WOO SIGHS.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: The first night in Eden Studio. The sounds of the city faded, replaced by the strange, intimate symphony of a building that felt like it was holding its breath.

dialogue.speaker: YOON JONG-WOO
dialogue.line: (Thought) Just sleep, Jong-woo. You have work tomorrow. Don't think about it. Don't think about them.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: FLOORBOARD CREAK. A THUMP FROM ABOVE. A SOFT, REPETITIVE TAPPING.

dialogue.speaker: YOON JONG-WOO
dialogue.line: (Thought) What the hell is that tapping? Is someone... watching me?

summary: Yoon Jong-woo arrives in Seoul for a new job, struggling to find affordable housing until he discovers the suspiciously cheap Eden Studio gosiwon. Despite the unsettling landlady and the cramped, strange atmosphere, he moves in, immediately experiencing the claustrophobia and bizarre noises of his new, creepy residence.
